PostToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$input = $Input | Out-String; $match = [regex]::Match($input, '(?i)([^\"''\s]+\.ps1)'); if ($match.Success) { $f = $match.Groups[1].Value; if (Test-Path $f) { $results = Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path $f -Severity Warning,Error; if ($results) { $results | Format-Table -Property Severity,RuleName,Line,Message -AutoSize | Out-String | Write-Host; exit 2 } else { Write-Host ('PSScriptAnalyzer: {0} is clean' -f $f) } } }"
